title: Paweł Liskowski
text: Home * People * Paweł Liskowski Paweł Liskowski [1] Paweł Liskowski , a Polish computer scientist and assistant professor at the Institute of Computing Science, Poznań University of Technology . His research interest include various subfields of artificial intelligence , such as evolutionary computation , genetic programming , deep learning , reinforcement learning , machine learning and pattern recognition [2] . His 2012 master's thesis focuses on comparison and analysis of methods that learn the Othello position evaluation [3] .
